name: Bank Of Clarke
description_short: Bank of Clarke is a full-service bank offering personal and business checking, savings, lending, credit cards, mortgages, and wealth management services with multiple branch locations.
description_long:
Bank of Clarke is an established banking institution that serves both individual consumers and business clients. The bank emphasizes building long-term customer relationships and operates multiple physical branches, including a recently opened McLean, Virginia location at 1313 Dolley Madison Blvd Ste 100. The institution maintains a professional web presence and offers comprehensive digital banking solutions. Bank of Clarke has demonstrated community commitment through its 40th Annual Charity Golf Tournament benefiting the Bank of Clarke Foundation.

The bank provides a wide range of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), personal loans, auto loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOC), credit cards, and mortgage services for home purchase and refinancing. For business clients, Bank of Clarke offers business checking and savings accounts, merchant services, cash management solutions, positive pay for check and ACH fraud prevention, remote deposit capabilities, and specialized lending for real estate, construction, small business, and government contract sectors. Additionally, the bank operates a wealth management division providing investment and asset management, trust administration, and estate planning services.

Bank of Clarke distinguishes itself through several offerings: free credit score access and monitoring without impacting credit scores, partnership with Greenlight for parents to teach children about digital spending, scam awareness and fraud protection resources, and positive pay solutions for business fraud prevention. The bank maintains both consumer and cash management online banking platforms with secure login systems. Customer service is available at (800)650-8723 with emphasis on fraud protection and scam prevention education.

As a traditional full-service bank, Bank of Clarke serves customers seeking comprehensive banking relationships with local branch access, personalized service, and multiple product lines under one institution. The bank appears well-established and community-focused, though specific information about interest rates, fees, credit requirements, and competitive positioning is not available from the website content provided. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Positive Pay (check and ACH fraud prevention)
Free credit score monitoring and reporting
Secure online banking platforms (consumer and cash management)
pros: Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, lending, credit cards, mortgages, and wealth management all under one institution
Free credit score access and monitoring without impacting your credit score, available anytime and anywhere
Multiple physical branch locations with recent expansion (new McLean branch opened)
Specialized business lending in real estate, construction, small business, and government contracts
Positive Pay fraud prevention for business checks and ACH transactions
Wealth management division offering professional investment and trust services
Strong community involvement through 40-year history of charitable golf tournament
cons: Website does not display specific interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules for comparison shopping
No information provided about minimum account balances or opening requirements
Limited details on credit card rewards programs, mortgage rate types, or loan eligibility criteria
best_for: Customers seeking a traditional full-service bank with multiple products and local branch access
Small business owners needing specialized lending in construction, real estate, or government contracting
Individuals interested in comprehensive wealth management and investment services
Families wanting to teach children about digital spending through Greenlight partnership
diagnosis: Bank of Clarke is best for customers seeking a traditional, full-service banking relationship with access to physical branches, multiple product lines, and personalized service. The main limitation is that the public website lacks specific pricing, rates, and fee information needed for detailed product comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
